meaning: adj.在南方的,向南方的,来自南方的adv.在南方,向南方,来自南方n.南风
examples: We set off in a southerly direction.
Because of the barrier of ice to the east, the Pacific Ocean to the west, and populated areas to the north, there may have been a greater impetus for people to move in a southerly direction.
OKINAWA, Japan's most southerly and poorest prefecture, is home to three-quarters of the country's American bases.
It's possible that a powerful southerly wind can blow them to Dallas up from the Gulf of Mexico.
The worst-battered areas will probably be the most southerly, from southern Zambia, southern Malawi and central Mozambique southwards.
